name: LW3A1 Frostline
note: Off-Meta BO6 Bolt-Sniper (7.62 NATO, 45 RPM, 5-round). reload roh '3330 s' -> 3.33. Universelle Slots = BO6-Pool.

Fast Mag I :: -2.8% ADS Time | -12.9% Reload | -3.4% Sprint to Fire
Extended Mag II :: +3.7% ADS Time | +21% Reload | +6.9% Sprint to Fire
MUZZLE: Ported Compensator :: -19.8% Gun Kick | -20% Vert. Recoil
